metadata.method_name: A-Priori SAE Firing-Structure Router (recall-hole-alone PRIMARY screen)
metadata.description: A single label-free firing-structure signal read from one cheap forward pass — the parent latent's RECALL-HOLE (the fraction of concept-positives the broad parent latent misses) — is the PRIMARY scree...

baselines.a: best single raw SAE latent (highest train AUC, content-responsive) — the individual latent to beat
baselines.h: supervised SAE standardized diff-of-means attribution pool (top-k, AxBench/SCR-TPP proxy)
baselines.d: non-SAE standardized diff-of-means probe on the raw layer-12 residual (required non-SAE baseline)
baselines.unit: label-free CCRG K-track-lite: parent anchor + firing-disjoint hole-covering absorbers

primary_rule.definition_string: predict ABSORPTION-regime iff (parent recall-hole > 0.7795); else CO-FIRING-regime

combined_rule.definition_string: [ABLATION] predict ABSORPTION-regime iff (firing-Jaccard < 0.3100) AND (parent recall-hole > 0.7795); else CO-FIRING-regime

jaccard_alone.note: corroborating signal only; mislabels numeric/taxonomic alone

ablation_combined.note: conjunction ABLATION; claimed as recommendation ONLY if it beats recall-hole-alone out-of-sample (conjunction_beats_primary below)

counterexamples: numeric: firing-Jaccard=0.285 is HIGH yet ground-truth=absorption -> jaccard-alone (absorption iff low-J) MISLABELS it; the combined rule routes it correctly only via the relaxed jaccard gate + recall...

taxonomic: firing-Jaccard=0.058 is LOW (narrow country specialists exist) yet ground-truth=co_firing: the parent already fires on 0.95 of positives (recall_hole_max=0.763) so there are no holes to fil...

recommended_rule.definition_string: predict ABSORPTION-regime iff (parent recall-hole > 0.7795); else CO-FIRING
recommended_rule.note: PRIMARY recommendation — strongest single separator on the derivation set, no derivation counterexample. Firing-Jaccard is a corroborating signal; the combined conjunction is an ablation.

jaccard_alone.note: corroborating signal only; mislabels numeric/taxonomic alone

ablation_combined.note: conjunction ABLATION; claimed as recommendation ONLY if it beats recall-hole-alone out-of-sample (conjunction_beats_primary below)

counterexamples: numeric: firing-Jaccard=0.285 is HIGH yet ground-truth=absorption -> jaccard-alone (absorption iff low-J) MISLABELS it; the combined rule routes it correctly only via the relaxed jaccard gate + recall...

taxonomic: firing-Jaccard=0.058 is LOW (narrow country specialists exist) yet ground-truth=co_firing: the parent already fires on 0.95 of positives (recall_hole_max=0.763) so there are no holes to fil...

reproduction_check.note: Reproduction is reported as actuals + flags; tolerance mismatches (e.g. spelling_O ~0.039, recomputed toxicity firing-Jaccard differing from the prior reference values) are NOT hard failures — the hon...

honest_notes: PRIMARY RECOMMENDATION = RECALL-HOLE-ALONE. The recommended a-priori screen is the single signal `predict absorption-regime iff parent recall-hole > 0.779`, which is the STRONGEST single separator on ...
